_comment: Generator input for the NOT-YET-WIRED trapezlemezes.hu. Fill the REPLACE_ME secret in a COPY outside git, then: node ../generate-site.mjs --input /tmp/trapezlemezes.json --out /tmp/trapez-out
_comment_gads: conversion_actions is EMPTY on purpose. Model 2: the gateway uploads Google Ads only OFFLINE (CRM lifecycle: lead_qualified, booking_confirmed, revenue_confirmed) — those actions do not exist yet in this Ads account and must be created first. The OLD on-site action IDs (quote_calculator_conversion 6926598604, callback_conversion 7176297115, contact_form_submit 7591648016, phone_conversion 6926366138) are browser-owned under Model 2 (AWCT) and must NOT be put here.
